DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-22-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom Conference
Elliott Montgomery, Esq. Esq., STONE & SALLUS LLP (310) 889-0233 emontgomery@stonesalluslaw.com Attorney for Plaintiff, Rumble Marina Co. and Jason Mighdoll
CANDICE S. NAM, ESQ., GORDON REES SCULLY MANSUKHANI, LLP (213) 576-5000 cnam@grsm.com
Attorney for Defendants, RUMBLE FITNESS, LLC, RUMBLE 1001, LLC, and XPONENTIAL FITNESS, INC.

Hearing is held. ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS RUMBLE FITNESS, LLC, RUMBLE 1001, LLC, AND XPONENTIAL FITNESS, INC.'s DEMURRER to COMPLAINT.

Defendants Rumble Fitness LLC (collectively "Rumble Fitness") et al. demur to plaintiffs Rumble Marina Co. and Jason Mighdoll (collectively Mighdoll)'s complaint. The demurrer is overruled as to the first, third, and fifth causes of action and sustained with leave to amend as to the second and fourth causes of action.

(see word minutes for entire ruling)

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-22-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom Conference
Elliott Montgomery, Esq. Esq., STONE & SALLUS LLP (310) 889-0233 emontgomery@stonesalluslaw.com Attorney for Plaintiff, Rumble Marina Co. and Jason Mighdoll
CANDICE S. NAM, ESQ., GORDON REES SCULLY MANSUKHANI, LLP (213) 576-5000 cnam@grsm.com
Attorney for Defendants, RUMBLE FITNESS, LLC, RUMBLE 1001, LLC, and XPONENTIAL FITNESS, INC.

Hearing is held. ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT RUMBLE FITNESS, LLC, RUMBLE 1001, LLC, XPONENTIAL FITNESS, INC. MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is taken under submission.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)
